reviews.comment:
Instalaciones impecables. Pasa un arroyo hermoso por el medio del camping. Fuimos con rodante. Nos cobraron 800 por persona y lo mismo la rodante por dia. Muy recomendable.

(Translated by Google)
Impeccable facilities. A beautiful stream runs through the middle of the campground. We went with a campervan. They charged us 800 pesos per person and the same for the campervan per day. Highly recommended.

reviews.comment:
Buen lugar, soy cliente habitual, la única crítica constructiva, por mi parte, la atención debería ser mas expeditiva, no tan relajada, sin matarse, pero mas ágil, a veces hay mucha cola, y los muchachos están como tomándose un café...

(Translated by Google)
Good place, I'm a regular customer. My only constructive criticism is that the service should be faster, not so relaxed, not too slow, but quicker. Sometimes there's a long queue, and the guys seem to be idling around like they're having a coffee...
